name: Lilac 12" Iron Side Table - Dark Blue - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Elevate your outdoor seating with an accessory that brings both style and function to your existing backyard arrangement. With a sleek, modern barrel structure and hollow framework, this end table is an excellent sidekick to your existing outdoor furniture, perfect for holding a tray of snacks or a fresh pitcher of lemonade. The frame of this side table features a simple floral iron cut design and a smooth finish, making this piece great for any area in need of something new.

MODERN DESIGN: With clean, precise lines, our side table is the ideal modern accessory for your space. Finished with a charming barrel structure and iron-cut design, this table not only offers a chic, minimalistic look but also provides incredible structure.

IRON CUT DESIGN: Refined with a clean iron cut design, the frame of this table brings a modern aesthetic to your space, making it an understated yet chic addition. This features a simplified floral pattern.

WEATHER RESISTANT: This side table is designed and tested to resist mild weather conditions. We always advise covering, storing, or providing other protection to our furniture in the event of heavy or repeated exposure to the elements, including water and UV rays.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This accent table is 12.25" W x 12.25" D x 17.75" H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.

NO ASSEMBLY: This accent table comes ready to use straight out of the box. No assembly is required.
